158 // Token: 0x06001981 RID: 6529 RVA: 0x004EB35C File Offset: 0x004E955C
159 public static void PrepareForChest(Chest chest)
160 {
161 int maxItems = chest.maxItems;
162 if (ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest.Length < maxItems)
163 {
164 Array.Resize<int>(ref ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest, maxItems);
165 }
166 if (ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHueChest.Length < maxItems)
167 {
168 Array.Resize<float>(ref ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHueChest, maxItems);
169 }
170 }
171
172 // Token: 0x06001982 RID: 6530 RVA: 0x004EB39C File Offset: 0x004E959C
173 public static void SetGlowForChest(Chest chest)
174 {
175 ItemSlot.PrepareForChest(chest);
176 int maxItems = chest.maxItems;
177 for (int i = 0; i < maxItems; i++)
178 {
179 ItemSlot.SetGlow(i, -1f, true);
180 }
181 for (int j = 0; j < maxItems; j++)
182 {
183 CoinSlot.ForceSlotState(j, 3, chest.item[j]);
184 }
185 }

187 // Token: 0x06001983 RID: 6531 RVA: 0x004EB3EC File Offset: 0x004E95EC
188 public static void SetGlow(int index, float hue, bool chest)
189 {
190 if (!chest)
191 {
192 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTime[index] = 300;
193 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHue[index] = hue;
194 return;
195 }
196 if (hue < 0f)
197 {
198 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest[index] = 0;
199 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHueChest[index] = 0f;
200 return;
201 }
202 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest[index] = 300;
203 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHueChest[index] = hue;
204 }

207 public static void UpdateInterface()
208 {

210 {
211 ItemSlot._customCurrencyForSavings = -1;
212 }

214 {
215 if (ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTime[i] > 0)
216 {
217 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTime[i]--;

219 {
220 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHue[i] = 0f;
221 }
222 }
223 }
224 for (int j = 0; j < ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest.Length; j++)
225 {
226 if (ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest[j] > 0)
227 {
228 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest[j]--;
229 if (ItemSlot.inventoryGlowTimeChest[j] == 0 || ItemSlot.forceClearGlowsOnChest)
230 {
231 ItemSlot.inventoryGlowHueChest[j] = 0f;

233 }
234 }
235 ItemSlot.forceClearGlowsOnChest = false;

237 {
238 ItemSlot.PulseEffect pulseEffect = ItemSlot.playerSlotPulseEffects[k];
239 if (pulseEffect.itemInSlot != null)
240 {

243 int num2 = array[num].time + 1;
244 array[num].time = num2;
245 if (num2 >= ItemSlot.PulseEffect.EffectDuration || pulseEffect.slotRef.Item.IsAir)

250 }
251 }

259 // Token: 0x06001986 RID: 6534 RVA: 0x004EB58C File Offset: 0x004E978C
260 public static void AddPulseEffect(PlayerItemSlotID.SlotReference slot, Color color)
261 {
262 ItemSlot.PulseEffect pulseEffect = new ItemSlot.PulseEffect(slot, color);
263 if (pulseEffect.itemInSlot.IsAir)
264 {
265 return;
266 }
267 ItemSlot.playerSlotPulseEffects[slot.SlotId] = pulseEffect;
268 }

303 // Token: 0x0600198A RID: 6538 RVA: 0x004EB644 File Offset: 0x004E9844
304 public static void OverrideHover(Item[] inv, int context = 0, int slot = 0)
305 {
306 if (!PlayerInput.UsingGamepad)
307 {
308 UILinkPointNavigator.SuggestUsage(ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(inv, context, slot));
309 }
310 if (inv[slot].IsAir)
311 {
312 return;
313 }
314 if (Main.keyState.IsKeyDown(Main.FavoriteKey))
315 {
316 if (Main.drawingPlayerChat && ItemSlot.canShareAt[context])
317 {
318 Main.cursorOverride = 2;
319 return;
320 }
321 if (ItemSlot.canFavoriteAt[context])
322 {
323 Main.cursorOverride = 3;
324 return;
325 }
326 }
327 ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction? alternateClickAction = ItemSlot.GetAlternateClickAction(inv, context, slot);
328 if (alternateClickAction != null)
329 {
330 Main.cursorOverride = alternateClickAction.Value.cursorOverride;
331 }
332 }

334 // Token: 0x0600198B RID: 6539 RVA: 0x004EB6CC File Offset: 0x004E98CC
335 public static ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction? GetAlternateClickAction(Item[] inv, int context, int slot)
336 {
337 Item item = inv[slot];
338 if (item.IsAir || item.favorited)
339 {
340 return null;
341 }
342 bool flag = ItemSlot.Options.DisableLeftShiftTrashCan && !PlayerInput.UsingGamepad;
343 if (ItemSlot.ControlInUse && !ItemSlot.Options.DisableQuickTrash && flag)
344 {
345 if (context <= 4 || context == 7 || context == 32)
346 {
347 return ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.GetSellOrTrash(item);
348 }
349 }
350 else if (ItemSlot.ShiftInUse)
351 {
352 if (Main.LocalPlayer.tileEntityAnchor.IsInValidUseTileEntity())
353 {
354 ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction? shiftClickAction = Main.LocalPlayer.tileEntityAnchor.GetTileEntity().GetShiftClickAction(inv, context, slot);
355 if (shiftClickAction != null)
356 {
357 return shiftClickAction;
358 }
359 }
360 switch (context)
361 {
362 case 0:
363 case 1:
364 case 2:
365 if (Main.CreativeMenu.IsShowingResearchMenu())
366 {
367 if (context == 0)
368 {
369 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.TransferToChest);
370 }
371 }
372 else if (Main.InReforgeMenu)
373 {
374 if (context == 0 && item.CanHavePrefixes())
375 {
376 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.TransferToChest);
377 }
378 }
379 else if (Main.InGuideCraftMenu)
380 {
381 if (context == 0 && item.material)
382 {
383 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.TransferToChest);
384 }
385 }
386 else if (Main.player[Main.myPlayer].chest != -1)
387 {
388 if (ChestUI.TryPlacingInChest(inv, slot, true, context))
389 {
390 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.TransferToChest);
391 }
392 }
393 else if (!ItemSlot.Options.DisableQuickTrash && !flag)
394 {
395 return ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.GetSellOrTrash(item);
396 }
397 break;
398 case 3:
399 case 4:
400 case 32:
401 if (Main.player[Main.myPlayer].ItemSpace(item).CanTakeItemToPersonalInventory)
402 {
403 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.TransferFromChest);
404 }
405 break;
406 case 5:
407 case 6:
408 case 7:
409 case 29:
410 if (Main.player[Main.myPlayer].ItemSpace(inv[slot]).CanTakeItemToPersonalInventory)
411 {
412 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.TransferToBackpack);
413 }
414 break;
415 case 8:
416 case 9:
417 case 10:
418 case 11:
419 case 12:
420 case 16:
421 case 17:
422 case 18:
423 case 19:
424 case 20:
425 case 33:
426 if (Main.player[Main.myPlayer].ItemSpace(inv[slot]).CanTakeItemToPersonalInventory)
427 {
428 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.Unequip);
429 }
430 break;
431 }
432 }
433 return null;
434 }

436 // Token: 0x0600198C RID: 6540 RVA: 0x004EB930 File Offset: 0x004E9B30
437 private static bool OverrideLeftClick(Item[] inv, int context = 0, int slot = 0)
438 {
439 if (Main.LocalPlayer.tileEntityAnchor.IsInValidUseTileEntity() && ItemSlot.ShiftInUse && Main.LocalPlayer.tileEntityAnchor.GetTileEntity().PerformShiftClickAction(inv, context, slot))
440 {
441 return true;
442 }
443 Item item = inv[slot];
444 if (Main.cursorOverride == 2)
445 {
446 if (ChatManager.AddChatText(FontAssets.MouseText.Value, ItemTagHandler.GenerateTag(item), Vector2.One))
447 {
448 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
449 }
450 return true;
451 }
452 if (Main.cursorOverride == 3)
453 {
454 if (!ItemSlot.canFavoriteAt[context])
455 {
456 return false;
457 }
458 item.favorited = !item.favorited;
459 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
460 return true;
461 }
462 else
463 {
464 if (Main.cursorOverride == 6)
465 {
466 Item item2 = item.DeepClone();
467 if (!(ItemSlot.TryResearchingItem(ref item2, true) | ItemSlot.TryResearchingItem(ref Main.LocalPlayer.trashItem, false)))
468 {
469 SoundEngine.PlaySound(SoundID.TrashItem, -1, -1, 0f, 1f);
470 }
471 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
472 Main.LocalPlayer.trashItem = item.Clone();
473 ItemSlot.AnnounceTransfer(new ItemSlot.ItemTransferInfo(Main.LocalPlayer.trashItem, context, 6, 0));
474 item.TurnToAir(false);
475 if (context == 3 && Main.netMode == 1)
476 {
477 NetMessage.SendData(32, -1, -1, null, Main.LocalPlayer.chest, (float)slot, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
478 }
479 CoinSlot.ForceSlotState(slot, context, inv[slot]);
480 return true;
481 }
482 if (Main.cursorOverride == 7)
483 {
484 if (context == 29)
485 {
486 Item item3 = new Item();
487 item3.SetDefaults(inv[slot].type, null);
488 item3.stack = (item3.OnlyNeedOneInInventory() ? 1 : item3.maxStack);
489 item3.OnCreated(new JourneyDuplicationItemCreationContext());
490 Player.GetItemLogger.Start();
491 item3 = Main.LocalPlayer.GetItem(item3, GetItemSettings.QuickTransferFromSlot);
492 Player.GetItemLogger.Stop();
493 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_GetItem(inv, context, slot);
494 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
495 return true;
496 }
497 Player.GetItemLogger.Start();
498 inv[slot] = Main.LocalPlayer.GetItem(inv[slot], GetItemSettings.QuickTransferFromSlot);
499 Player.GetItemLogger.Stop();
500 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_GetItem(inv, context, slot);
501 CoinSlot.ForceSlotState(slot, context, inv[slot]);
502 SoundEngine.PlaySound(12, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
503 return true;
504 }
505 else
506 {
507 if (Main.cursorOverride == 8)
508 {
509 Player.GetItemLogger.Start();
510 inv[slot] = Main.LocalPlayer.GetItem(inv[slot], GetItemSettings.QuickTransferFromSlot);
511 Player.GetItemLogger.Stop();
512 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_GetItem(inv, context, slot);
513 if (Main.player[Main.myPlayer].chest > -1)
514 {
515 NetMessage.SendData(32, -1, -1, null, Main.player[Main.myPlayer].chest, (float)slot, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
516 }
517 CoinSlot.ForceSlotState(slot, context, inv[slot]);
518 return true;
519 }
520 if (Main.cursorOverride == 9)
521 {
522 if (Main.CreativeMenu.IsShowingResearchMenu())
523 {
524 Main.CreativeMenu.SwapItem(ref inv[slot]);
525 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
526 Main.CreativeMenu.SacrificeItemInSacrificeSlot();
527 }
528 else if (Main.InReforgeMenu)
529 {
530 if (item.stack <= 1)
531 {
532 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref inv[slot], ref Main.reforgeItem);
533 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, slot, context, Main.reforgeItem, 5);
534 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
535 }
536 else if (Main.reforgeItem.IsAir)
537 {
538 Main.reforgeItem = item.Clone();
539 Main.reforgeItem.stack = 1;
540 item.stack--;
541 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, slot, context, Main.reforgeItem, 5);
542 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
543 }
544 }
545 else if (Main.InGuideCraftMenu)
546 {
547 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref inv[slot], ref Main.guideItem);
548 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, slot, context, Main.guideItem, 7);
549 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
550 }
551 else
552 {
553 ChestUI.TryPlacingInChest(inv, slot, false, context);
554 }
555 return true;
556 }
557 if (Main.cursorOverride == 10)
558 {
559 Chest chest = Main.instance.shop[Main.npcShop];
560 if (Main.LocalPlayer.SellItem(item, -1))
561 {
562 chest.AddItemToShop(item);
563 ItemSlot.AnnounceTransfer(new ItemSlot.ItemTransferInfo(item, context, 15, 0));
564 item.TurnToAir(false);
565 SoundEngine.PlaySound(18, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
566 }
567 else if (item.value == 0)
568 {
569 chest.AddItemToShop(item);
570 ItemSlot.AnnounceTransfer(new ItemSlot.ItemTransferInfo(item, context, 15, 0));
571 item.TurnToAir(false);
572 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
573 }
574 return true;
575 }
576 return false;
577 }
578 }
579 }

581 // Token: 0x0600198D RID: 6541 RVA: 0x004EBDD8 File Offset: 0x004E9FD8
582 public static void LeftClick(Item[] inv, int context = 0, int slot = 0)
583 {
584 if (Main.LocalPlayerHasPendingInventoryActions())
585 {
586 return;
587 }
588 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];
589 inv[slot].newAndShiny = false;
590 bool flag = Main.mouseLeftRelease && Main.mouseLeft;
591 if (flag)
592 {
593 if (ItemSlot.OverrideLeftClick(inv, context, slot))
594 {
595 return;
596 }
597 if (player.itemAnimation != 0 || player.itemTime != 0)
598 {
599 return;
600 }
601 }
602 int num = ItemSlot.PickItemMovementAction(inv, context, slot, Main.mouseItem);
603 if (num != 3 && !flag)
604 {
605 return;
606 }
607 if (num == 0)
608 {
609 bool flag2 = false;
610 if (context == 6 && Main.mouseItem.type != 0)
611 {
612 Item item = Main.mouseItem.DeepClone();
613 if (ItemSlot.TryResearchingItem(ref item, true) | ItemSlot.TryResearchingItem(inv, slot, false))
614 {
615 flag2 = true;
616 }
617 inv[slot].SetDefaults(0, null);
618 }
619 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref inv[slot], ref Main.mouseItem);
620 if (inv[slot].stack > 0)
621 {
622 ItemSlot.AnnounceTransfer(new ItemSlot.ItemTransferInfo(inv[slot], 21, context, inv[slot].stack));
623 }
624 else
625 {
626 ItemSlot.AnnounceTransfer(new ItemSlot.ItemTransferInfo(Main.mouseItem, context, 21, Main.mouseItem.stack));
627 }
628 if (inv[slot].stack > 0)
629 {
630 if (context <= 17)
631 {
632 if (context == 0)
633 {
634 AchievementsHelper.NotifyItemPickup(player, inv[slot]);
635 goto IL_013F;
636 }
637 if (context - 8 > 4 && context - 16 > 1)
638 {
639 goto IL_013F;
640 }
641 }
642 else if (context != 25 && context != 27 && context != 33)
643 {
644 goto IL_013F;
645 }
646 AchievementsHelper.HandleOnEquip(player, inv[slot], context);
647 }
648 IL_013F:
649 if (inv[slot].type == 0 || inv[slot].stack < 1)
650 {
651 inv[slot] = new Item();
652 }
653 if (Item.CanStack(Main.mouseItem, inv[slot]))
654 {
655 Utils.Swap<bool>(ref inv[slot].favorited, ref Main.mouseItem.favorited);
656 if (inv[slot].stack != inv[slot].maxStack && Main.mouseItem.stack != Main.mouseItem.maxStack)
657 {
658 if (Main.mouseItem.stack + inv[slot].stack <= Main.mouseItem.maxStack)
659 {
660 inv[slot].stack += Main.mouseItem.stack;
661 Main.mouseItem.stack = 0;
662 ItemSlot.AnnounceTransfer(new ItemSlot.ItemTransferInfo(inv[slot], 21, context, inv[slot].stack));
663 }
664 else
665 {

934 }
935
936 // Token: 0x0600198F RID: 6543 RVA: 0x004EC89C File Offset: 0x004EAA9C
937 private static bool TryResearchingItem(ref Item item, bool onlySacrificeIfItWouldFinishResearch = false)
938 {
939 if (!Main.IsJourneyMode)
940 {
941 return false;
942 }
943 if (item == null || item.IsAir)
944 {
945 return false;
946 }
947 int num;
948 CreativeUI.ItemSacrificeResult itemSacrificeResult = Main.CreativeMenu.SacrificeItem(ref item, out num, false, onlySacrificeIfItWouldFinishResearch);
949 if (itemSacrificeResult == CreativeUI.ItemSacrificeResult.CannotSacrifice)
950 {
951 return false;
952 }
953 if (itemSacrificeResult == CreativeUI.ItemSacrificeResult.SacrificedAndDone)
954 {
955 SoundEngine.PlaySound(64, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
956 }
957 else
958 {
959 SoundEngine.PlaySound(63, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
960 }
961 return true;
962 }
963

1474 // Token: 0x06001999 RID: 6553 RVA: 0x004ED92C File Offset: 0x004EBB2C
1475 private static bool TryOpenContainer_GrantItems(Item item, Player player)

1478 {
1479 player.OpenBossBag(item.type);
1480 }
1481 else if (ItemID.Sets.IsFishingCrate[item.type])
1482 {
1483 player.OpenFishingCrate(item.type);
1484 }
1485 else if (item.type == 3093)
1486 {
1487 player.OpenHerbBag(3093);
1488 }
1489 else if (item.type == 4345)
1490 {
1491 player.OpenCanofWorms(item.type);
1492 }
1493 else if (item.type == 4410)
1494 {
1495 player.OpenOyster(item.type);
1496 }
1497 else if (item.type == 1774)
1498 {
1499 player.OpenGoodieBag(1774);
1500 }
1501 else if (item.type == 6142)
1502 {
1503 player.OpenChilletEgg(6142);
1504 }

1506 {
1507 if (!player.ConsumeItem(327, false, true))
1508 {
1509 return false;
1510 }
1511 player.OpenLockBox(3085);
1512 }

1514 {
1515 if (!player.HasItemInInventoryOrOpenVoidBag(329))
1516 {
1517 return false;
1518 }
1519 player.OpenShadowLockbox(4879);
1520 }
1521 else if (item.type == 1869)
1522 {
1523 player.OpenPresent(1869);
1524 }
1525 else
1526 {
1527 if (item.type != 599 && item.type != 600 && item.type != 601)
1528 {
1529 return false;
1530 }
1531 player.OpenLegacyPresent(item.type);
1532 }
1533 return true;
1534 }

2486 public static Color GetColorByLoadout(int slot, int context)
2487 {

2491 {
2492 color = color2;

2498 num = 0f;
2499 }
2500 return Color.Lerp(color3, Color.White, num * num * num);

2509 // Token: 0x060019A3 RID: 6563 RVA: 0x004EFB1C File Offset: 0x004EDD1C
2510 public static bool TryGetSlotColor(int loadoutIndex, int context, out Color color)

2514 {
2515 return false;

2520 case 8:
2521 case 10:

2528 case 12:
2529 num = 2;
2530 break;
2531 }
2532 if (num == -1)
2533 {
2534 return false;

2536 color = ItemSlot.LoadoutSlotColors[loadoutIndex, num];
2537 return true;
2538 }
2539
2540 // Token: 0x060019A4 RID: 6564 RVA: 0x004EFB7D File Offset: 0x004EDD7D
2541 public static float ShiftHueByLoadout(float hue, int loadoutIndex)
2542 {
2543 return (hue + (float)loadoutIndex / 8f) % 1f;
2544 }
2545
2546 // Token: 0x060019A5 RID: 6565 RVA: 0x004EFB8F File Offset: 0x004EDD8F
2547 public static Color GetLoadoutColor(int loadoutIndex)

2572 if (context == 37)
2573 {

2578 }
2579 Color color3;

2643 color6 = Item.GetPhaseColor(item.shoot, true);
2644 }

2652 }

2689 // Token: 0x060019A8 RID: 6568 RVA: 0x004F0144 File Offset: 0x004EE344
2690 private static int GetGamepadPointForSlot(Item[] inv, int context, int slot)
2691 {
2692 Player localPlayer = Main.LocalPlayer;
2693 int num = -1;
2694 switch (context)
2695 {
2696 case 0:
2697 case 1:
2698 case 2:
2699 num = slot;
2700 break;
2701 case 3:
2702 case 4:
2703 case 32:
2704 num = 400 + slot - ChestUI.StartingRowForDrawing * 10;
2705 break;
2706 case 5:
2707 num = 303;
2708 break;
2709 case 6:
2710 num = 300;
2711 break;
2712 case 7:
2713 num = (NewCraftingUI.Visible ? 20020 : 1500);
2714 break;
2715 case 8:
2716 case 9:
2717 case 10:
2718 case 11:
2719 {
2720 int num2 = slot;
2721 if (num2 % 10 == 9 && !localPlayer.CanDemonHeartAccessoryBeShown())
2722 {
2723 num2--;
2724 }
2725 num = 100 + num2;
2726 break;
2727 }
2728 case 12:
2729 if (inv == localPlayer.dye)
2730 {
2731 int num3 = slot;
2732 if (num3 % 10 == 9 && !localPlayer.CanDemonHeartAccessoryBeShown())
2733 {
2734 num3--;
2735 }
2736 num = 120 + num3;
2737 }
2738 break;
2739 case 15:
2740 num = 2700 + slot;
2741 break;
2742 case 16:
2743 num = 184;
2744 break;
2745 case 17:
2746 num = 183;
2747 break;
2748 case 18:
2749 num = 182;
2750 break;
2751 case 19:
2752 num = 180;
2753 break;
2754 case 20:
2755 num = 181;
2756 break;
2757 case 22:
2758 if (UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.CRAFT_CurrentRecipeBig != -1)
2759 {
2760 num = 22000 + UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.CRAFT_CurrentRecipeBig;
2761 }
2762 if (UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.CRAFT_CurrentRecipeSmall != -1)
2763 {
2764 num = 1500 + UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.CRAFT_CurrentRecipeSmall + 1;
2765 }
2766 break;
2767 case 23:
2768 case 24:
2769 case 39:
2770 num = 5100 + slot;
2771 break;
2772 case 25:
2773 num = 5109 + slot;
2774 break;
2775 case 26:
2776 num = 5000 + slot;
2777 break;
2778 case 27:
2779 num = 5002 + slot;
2780 break;
2781 case 29:
2782 case 34:
2783 case 41:
2784 num = 3000 + slot;
2785 if (UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.ItemSlotShouldHighlightAsSelected)
2786 {
2787 num = UILinkPointNavigator.CurrentPoint;
2788 }
2789 break;
2790 case 30:
2791 num = 15000 + slot;
2792 break;
2793 case 33:
2794 if (inv == localPlayer.miscDyes)
2795 {
2796 num = 185 + slot;
2797 }
2798 break;
2799 case 35:
2800 if (UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.CRAFT_CurrentRecipeSmall != -1)
2801 {
2802 num = 12000;
2803 }
2804 if (UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.CRAFT_CurrentRecipeBig != -1)
2805 {
2806 num = 11100;
2807 }
2808 break;
2809 case 38:
2810 num = 5118;
2811 break;
2812 case 42:
2813 num = 20000;
2814 break;
2815 case 43:
2816 num = 20001 + UILinkPointNavigator.Shortcuts.NewCraftingUI_MaterialIndex;
2817 break;
2818 }
2819 return num;
2820 }

2835 // Token: 0x060019AB RID: 6571 RVA: 0x004F03E8 File Offset: 0x004EE5E8
2836 public static int GetBulkBuyAmount(Item item)
2837 {
2838 int num = 10;
2839 if (!item.buyOnce)
2840 {
2841 return num;
2842 }
2843 return Math.Min(num, item.stack);
2844 }
2845
2846 // Token: 0x060019AC RID: 6572 RVA: 0x004F040E File Offset: 0x004EE60E
2847 public static bool CanBulkBuy(Item item)
2848 {
2849 return (item.isAShopItem || item.buyOnce) && ItemSlot.ShiftInUse;
2850 }
2851
2852 // Token: 0x060019AD RID: 6573 RVA: 0x004F042C File Offset: 0x004EE62C
2853 public static int GetBulkCraftAmount(Item item)
2854 {
2855 int num = item.maxStack / item.stack;
2856 if (num < 1)
2857 {
2858 num = 1;
2859 }
2860 return Math.Min(num, 10);
2861 }
2862
2863 // Token: 0x060019AE RID: 6574 RVA: 0x004F0458 File Offset: 0x004EE658
2864 public static int EstimateDisplayStack(Item item)
2865 {
2866 int num = (item.buyOnce ? 1 : item.stack);

2868 {
2869 int bulkBuyAmount = ItemSlot.GetBulkBuyAmount(item);
2870 return num * bulkBuyAmount;
2871 }
2872 if (Main.TryingToBulkCraft() && ((item.tooltipContext == 22 && item.tooltipSlot == 0) || item.tooltipContext == 42 || item.tooltipContext == 41))
2873 {
2874 return ItemSlot.GetBulkCraftAmount(item) * item.stack;
2875 }
2876 return num;
2877 }

2879 // Token: 0x060019AF RID: 6575 RVA: 0x004F04C8 File Offset: 0x004EE6C8
2880 public static void MouseHover(Item[] inv, int context = 0, int slot = 0)
2881 {
2882 if (context == 6 && Main.hoverItemName == null)
2883 {
2884 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[3].Value;
2885 }
2886 if (!inv[slot].IsAir)
2887 {
2888 ItemSlot._customCurrencyForSavings = inv[slot].shopSpecialCurrency;
2889 Main.hoverItemName = inv[slot].Name;
2890 if (inv[slot].stack > 1)
2891 {
2892 Main.hoverItemName = string.Concat(new object[]
2893 {
2894 Main.hoverItemName,
2895 " (",
2896 inv[slot].stack,
2897 ")"
2898 });
2899 }
2900 Main.HoverItem = inv[slot].Clone();
2901 Main.HoverItem.tooltipContext = context;
2902 Main.HoverItem.tooltipSlot = inv[slot].tooltipSlot;
2903 if (context == 8)
2904 {
2905 Main.HoverItem.wornArmor = true;
2906 return;
2907 }
2908 if (context == 11 || context == 9)
2909 {
2910 Main.HoverItem.social = true;
2911 return;
2912 }
2913 if (context == 15)
2914 {
2915 Main.HoverItem.buy = true;
2916 return;
2917 }
2918 }
2919 else
2920 {
2921 if (context == 10 || context == 11 || context == 24)
2922 {
2923 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[9].Value;
2924 }
2925 if (context == 11)
2926 {
2927 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[11].Value + " " + Main.hoverItemName;
2928 }
2929 if (context == 8 || context == 9 || context == 23 || context == 26)
2930 {
2931 if (slot == 0 || slot == 10 || context == 26)
2932 {
2933 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[12].Value;
2934 }
2935 else if (slot == 1 || slot == 11)
2936 {
2937 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[13].Value;
2938 }
2939 else if (slot == 2 || slot == 12)
2940 {
2941 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[14].Value;
2942 }
2943 else if (slot >= 10)
2944 {
2945 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[11].Value + " " + Main.hoverItemName;
2946 }
2947 }
2948 if (context == 12 || context == 25 || context == 27 || context == 33)
2949 {
2950 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[57].Value;
2951 }
2952 if (context == 16)
2953 {
2954 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[90].Value;
2955 }
2956 if (context == 17 || context == 39)
2957 {
2958 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[91].Value;
2959 }
2960 if (context == 19)
2961 {
2962 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[92].Value;
2963 }
2964 if (context == 18)
2965 {
2966 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[93].Value;
2967 }
2968 if (context == 20)
2969 {
2970 Main.hoverItemName = Lang.inter[94].Value;
2971 }

2973 {
2974 Main.hoverItemName = Language.GetTextValue("UI.DisplayDollWeapon");

2995 {
2996 return !item.IsAir && (item.dye > 0 || Main.projHook[item.shoot] || item.mountType != -1 || (item.buffType > 0 && (Main.lightPet[item.buffType] || Main.vanityPet[item.buffType])) || item.headSlot != -1 || item.bodySlot != -1 || item.legSlot != -1 || item.accessory);
2997 }

2999 // Token: 0x060019B3 RID: 6579 RVA: 0x004F07FC File Offset: 0x004EE9FC
3000 public static void SwapEquip(Item[] inv, int context, int slot)
3001 {
3002 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];
3003 if (inv[slot].IsAir)
3004 {
3005 return;
3006 }
3007 if (inv[slot].dye > 0)
3008 {
3009 bool flag;
3010 int num;
3011 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.DyeSwap(inv[slot], out flag, out num);
3012 if (flag)
3013 {
3014 Main.EquipPageSelected = 0;
3015 AchievementsHelper.HandleOnEquip(player, inv[slot], 12);
3016 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.dye, 12, num);
3017 }
3018 }
3019 else if (Main.projHook[inv[slot].shoot])
3020 {
3021 bool flag;
3022 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.EquipSwap(inv[slot], player.miscEquips, 4, out flag);
3023 if (flag)
3024 {
3025 Main.EquipPageSelected = 2;
3026 AchievementsHelper.HandleOnEquip(player, player.miscEquips[4], 16);
3027 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.miscEquips, 16, 4);
3028 }
3029 }
3030 else if (inv[slot].mountType != -1 && !MountID.Sets.Cart[inv[slot].mountType])
3031 {
3032 bool flag;
3033 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.EquipSwap(inv[slot], player.miscEquips, 3, out flag);
3034 if (flag)
3035 {
3036 Main.EquipPageSelected = 2;
3037 AchievementsHelper.HandleOnEquip(player, inv[slot], 17);
3038 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.miscEquips, 17, 3);
3039 }
3040 }
3041 else if (inv[slot].mountType != -1 && MountID.Sets.Cart[inv[slot].mountType])
3042 {
3043 bool flag;
3044 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.EquipSwap(inv[slot], player.miscEquips, 2, out flag);
3045 if (flag)
3046 {
3047 Main.EquipPageSelected = 2;
3048 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.miscEquips, 18, 2);
3049 }
3050 }
3051 else if (inv[slot].buffType > 0 && Main.lightPet[inv[slot].buffType])
3052 {
3053 bool flag;
3054 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.EquipSwap(inv[slot], player.miscEquips, 1, out flag);
3055 if (flag)
3056 {
3057 Main.EquipPageSelected = 2;
3058 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.miscEquips, 20, 1);
3059 }
3060 }
3061 else if (inv[slot].buffType > 0 && Main.vanityPet[inv[slot].buffType])
3062 {
3063 bool flag;
3064 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.EquipSwap(inv[slot], player.miscEquips, 0, out flag);
3065 if (flag)
3066 {
3067 Main.EquipPageSelected = 2;
3068 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.miscEquips, 19, 0);
3069 }
3070 }
3071 else
3072 {
3073 int num2 = (inv[slot].accessory ? 10 : (inv[slot].vanity ? 9 : 8));
3074 bool flag;
3075 int num3;
3076 inv[slot] = ItemSlot.ArmorSwap(inv[slot], out flag, out num3);
3077 if (flag)
3078 {
3079 Main.EquipPageSelected = 0;
3080 Item item = player.armor[num3];
3081 AchievementsHelper.HandleOnEquip(player, item, num2);
3082 ItemSlot.DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(inv, context, slot, player.armor, num2, num3);
3083 }
3084 }
3085 if (context == 3 && Main.netMode == 1)
3086 {
3087 NetMessage.SendData(32, -1, -1, null, player.chest, (float)slot, 0f, 0f, 0, 0, 0);
3088 }
3089 }
3090
3091 // Token: 0x060019B4 RID: 6580 RVA: 0x004F0A8C File Offset: 0x004EEC8C
3092 public static void DisplayTransfer_GetItem(Item[] arrayFrom, int fromContext, int fromSlot)
3093 {
3094 Vector2 position = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(arrayFrom, fromContext, fromSlot));
3095 foreach (PlayerGetItemLogger.GetItemLoggerEntry getItemLoggerEntry in Player.GetItemLogger.Entries)
3096 {
3097 Vector2 position2 = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(getItemLoggerEntry.TargetArray, getItemLoggerEntry.TargetItemSlotContext, getItemLoggerEntry.TargetSlot));
3098 int timeToAnimate = ItemSlot.GetTimeToAnimate(position, position2);
3099 Item item = getItemLoggerEntry.TargetArray[getItemLoggerEntry.TargetSlot];
3100 bool flag = ItemSlot.TryDisplayTransfer(ref position, ref position2, item, getItemLoggerEntry.Stack, timeToAnimate);
3101 bool flag2 = item.stack == getItemLoggerEntry.Stack;
3102 if (flag && flag2)
3103 {
3104 ItemSlot.AddCooldown(getItemLoggerEntry.TargetItemSlotContext, getItemLoggerEntry.TargetSlot, timeToAnimate);
3105 }
3106 }
3107 }
3108
3109 // Token: 0x060019B5 RID: 6581 RVA: 0x004F0B60 File Offset: 0x004EED60
3110 private static int GetTimeToAnimate(Vector2 startPosition, Vector2 endPosition)
3111 {
3112 int num = 15;
3113 int num2 = (int)Vector2.Distance(startPosition, endPosition) / 20;
3114 if (num2 > 15)
3115 {
3116 num2 = 15;
3117 }
3118 return num + num2;
3119 }
3120
3121 // Token: 0x060019B6 RID: 6582 RVA: 0x004F0B88 File Offset: 0x004EED88
3122 public static void DisplayTransfer_OneWay(Item[] arrayFrom, int fromContext, int fromSlot, Item[] arrayTo, int toContext, int toSlot, int stackSize = 1)
3123 {
3124 int gamepadPointForSlot = ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(arrayFrom, fromContext, fromSlot);
3125 int gamepadPointForSlot2 = ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(arrayTo, toContext, toSlot);
3126 Vector2 position = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(gamepadPointForSlot);
3127 Vector2 position2 = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(gamepadPointForSlot2);
3128 int timeToAnimate = ItemSlot.GetTimeToAnimate(position, position2);
3129 bool flag = ItemSlot.TryDisplayTransfer(ref position, ref position2, arrayTo[toSlot], stackSize, timeToAnimate);
3130 bool flag2 = arrayTo[toSlot].stack == stackSize;
3131 if (flag && flag2)
3132 {
3133 ItemSlot.AddCooldown(toContext, toSlot, timeToAnimate);
3134 }
3135 }
3136
3137 // Token: 0x060019B7 RID: 6583 RVA: 0x004F0BEC File Offset: 0x004EEDEC
3138 public static void DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(Item[] arrayFrom, int fromContext, int fromSlot, Item toItem, int toContext)
3139 {
3140 int gamepadPointForSlot = ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(arrayFrom, fromContext, fromSlot);
3141 int gamepadPointForSlot2 = ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(ItemSlot._dirtyHack, toContext, 0);
3142 Vector2 position = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(gamepadPointForSlot);
3143 Vector2 position2 = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(gamepadPointForSlot2);
3144 int timeToAnimate = ItemSlot.GetTimeToAnimate(position, position2);
3145 if (ItemSlot.TryDisplayTransfer(ref position, ref position2, toItem, toItem.stack, timeToAnimate))
3146 {
3147 ItemSlot.AddCooldown(toContext, 0, timeToAnimate);
3148 }
3149 if (ItemSlot.TryDisplayTransfer(ref position2, ref position, arrayFrom[fromSlot], arrayFrom[fromSlot].stack, timeToAnimate))
3150 {
3151 ItemSlot.AddCooldown(fromContext, fromSlot, timeToAnimate);
3152 }
3153 }
3154
3155 // Token: 0x060019B8 RID: 6584 RVA: 0x004F0C60 File Offset: 0x004EEE60
3156 public static void DisplayTransfer_TwoWay(Item[] arrayFrom, int fromContext, int fromSlot, Item[] arrayTo, int toContext, int toSlot)
3157 {
3158 int gamepadPointForSlot = ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(arrayFrom, fromContext, fromSlot);
3159 int gamepadPointForSlot2 = ItemSlot.GetGamepadPointForSlot(arrayTo, toContext, toSlot);
3160 Vector2 position = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(gamepadPointForSlot);
3161 Vector2 position2 = UILinkPointNavigator.GetPosition(gamepadPointForSlot2);
3162 int timeToAnimate = ItemSlot.GetTimeToAnimate(position, position2);
3163 if (ItemSlot.TryDisplayTransfer(ref position, ref position2, arrayTo[toSlot], arrayTo[toSlot].stack, timeToAnimate))
3164 {
3165 ItemSlot.AddCooldown(toContext, toSlot, timeToAnimate);
3166 }
3167 if (ItemSlot.TryDisplayTransfer(ref position2, ref position, arrayFrom[fromSlot], arrayFrom[fromSlot].stack, timeToAnimate))
3168 {
3169 ItemSlot.AddCooldown(fromContext, fromSlot, timeToAnimate);
3170 }
3171 }
3172
3173 // Token: 0x060019B9 RID: 6585 RVA: 0x004F0CD8 File Offset: 0x004EEED8
3174 private static void AddCooldown(int context, int slot, int time)
3175 {
3176 ItemSlot._nextTickDrawAvailable[new ItemSlot.ItemDisplayKey
3177 {
3178 Slot = slot,
3179 Context = context
3180 }] = Main.EverLastingTicker + (ulong)((long)time);
3181 }
3182

3184 private static bool TryDisplayTransfer(ref Vector2 pointPositionFrom, ref Vector2 pointPositionTo, Item toItem, int stackSize, int animationTime)

3187 }

3189 // Token: 0x060019BB RID: 6587 RVA: 0x004F0D10 File Offset: 0x004EEF10
3190 public static bool CanEquipBothAccessories(Item acc1, Item acc2)
3191 {
3192 return acc1.type != acc2.type && (acc1.wingSlot <= 0 || acc2.wingSlot <= 0);
3193 }

3201 {

3204 }

3207 return false;
3208 }

3234 // Token: 0x060019BF RID: 6591 RVA: 0x004F0DF0 File Offset: 0x004EEFF0
3235 private static Item DyeSwap(Item item, out bool success, out int targetSlot)
3236 {
3237 targetSlot = -1;
3238 success = false;
3239 if (item.dye <= 0)
3240 {
3241 return item;
3242 }
3243 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];

3245 {
3246 ItemSlot.dyeSwapCounter = (ItemSlot.dyeSwapCounter + 1) % 10;
3247 }
3248 for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
3249 {
3250 if (player.IsItemSlotUnlockedAndUsable(i) && player.dye[i].IsAir)
3251 {
3252 ItemSlot.dyeSwapCounter = i;
3253 break;
3254 }
3255 }
3256 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
3257 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref item, ref player.dye[ItemSlot.dyeSwapCounter]);
3258 targetSlot = ItemSlot.dyeSwapCounter;

3260 success = true;
3261 return item;
3262 }

3264 // Token: 0x060019C0 RID: 6592 RVA: 0x004F0EAC File Offset: 0x004EF0AC
3265 private static Item ArmorSwap(Item item, out bool success, out int targetSlot)
3266 {
3267 targetSlot = -1;
3268 success = false;
3269 if (item.stack < 1)
3270 {
3271 return item;
3272 }
3273 if (item.headSlot == -1 && item.bodySlot == -1 && item.legSlot == -1 && !item.accessory)
3274 {
3275 return item;
3276 }
3277 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];
3278 int num = (item.vanity ? 10 : 0);

3280 {
3281 if (ItemSlot.HasSameItemInSlot(item, new ArraySegment<Item>(Main.LocalPlayer.armor, 0, 3)) || ItemSlot.HasSameItemInSlot(item, new ArraySegment<Item>(Main.LocalPlayer.armor, 10, 3)))
3282 {
3283 return item;
3284 }
3285 }
3286 else if (item.accessory && (item.vanity ? ItemSlot.HasSameItemInSlot(item, new ArraySegment<Item>(player.armor, 3, 7)) : ItemSlot.HasSameItemInSlot(item, new ArraySegment<Item>(player.armor, 13, 7))))
3287 {
3288 return item;
3289 }
3290 if (item.headSlot != -1)
3291 {
3292 targetSlot = num;
3293 }
3294 else if (item.bodySlot != -1)
3295 {
3296 targetSlot = num + 1;
3297 }
3298 else if (item.legSlot != -1)
3299 {
3300 targetSlot = num + 2;
3301 }
3302 else if (item.accessory)
3303 {
3304 ArraySegment<Item> arraySegment = new ArraySegment<Item>(player.armor, 3 + num, 7);
3305 if (ItemSlot.HasIncompatibleAccessory(item, arraySegment, out targetSlot))
3306 {
3307 if (!player.IsItemSlotUnlockedAndUsable(targetSlot))
3308 {
3309 return item;
3310 }
3311 }
3312 else
3313 {
3314 targetSlot = arraySegment.Offset;
3315 for (int i = 0; i < arraySegment.Count; i++)
3316 {
3317 int num2 = i + arraySegment.Offset;
3318 if (player.IsItemSlotUnlockedAndUsable(num2) && arraySegment.Array[num2].IsAir)
3319 {
3320 targetSlot = num2;
3321 break;
3322 }
3323 }
3324 }
3325 }
3326 if (targetSlot == -1)
3327 {
3328 return item;
3329 }
3330 item.favorited = false;
3331 SoundEngine.PlaySound(7, -1, -1, 1, 1f, 0f);
3332 Utils.Swap<Item>(ref item, ref player.armor[targetSlot]);
3333 success = true;
3334 return item;
3335 }

3337 // Token: 0x060019C1 RID: 6593 RVA: 0x004F107A File Offset: 0x004EF27A

3347 return item2;
3348 }

3350 // Token: 0x060019C2 RID: 6594 RVA: 0x004F10BC File Offset: 0x004EF2BC
3351 public static void DrawMoney(SpriteBatch sb, string text, float shopx, float shopy, int[] coinsArray, bool horizontal = false, bool fromSavings = false)
3352 {

3357 coinDrawState.stackTextScale = 1f;
3358 if (horizontal)
3359 {
3360 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
3361 {
3362 Main.instance.LoadItem(74 - i);
3363 if (i == 0)
3364 {
3365 int num = coinsArray[3 - i];
3366 }
3367 int num2 = coinsArray[3 - i];
3368 if (num2 > 999)
3369 {
3370 num2 = 999;
3371 }
3372 if (fromSavings)
3373 {
3374 CoinSlot.UpdateSavings(i, num2, out coinDrawState);
3375 }
3376 Vector2 vector = new Vector2(shopx + ChatManager.GetStringSize(FontAssets.MouseText.Value, text, Vector2.One, -1f).X + (float)(24 * i) + 45f, shopy + 50f);
3377 CoinSlot.DrawItemCoin(sb, vector + new Vector2(0f, -coinDrawState.coinYOffset), 74 - i, coinDrawState.coinAnimFrame, 1f, 1024f, Color.White, 1f);
3378 Utils.DrawBorderStringFourWay(sb, FontAssets.ItemStack.Value, num2.ToString(), vector.X - 11f, vector.Y + (float)FontAssets.ItemStack.Value.LineSpacing * 0.75f, Color.White, Color.Black, new Vector2(0f, (float)FontAssets.ItemStack.Value.LineSpacing), 0.75f * coinDrawState.stackTextScale);
3379 }
3380 return;
3381 }
3382 for (int j = 0; j < 4; j++)
3383 {
3384 Main.instance.LoadItem(74 - j);
3385 int num3 = ((j == 0 && coinsArray[3 - j] > 99) ? (-6) : 0);
3386 int num4 = coinsArray[3 - j];
3387 if (num4 > 999)
3388 {
3389 num4 = 999;
3390 }
3391 if (fromSavings)
3392 {
3393 CoinSlot.UpdateSavings(j, num4, out coinDrawState);
3394 }
3395 CoinSlot.DrawItemCoin(sb, new Vector2(shopx + 11f + (float)(24 * j), shopy + 75f - coinDrawState.coinYOffset), 74 - j, coinDrawState.coinAnimFrame, 1f, 1024f, Color.White, 1f);
3396 Utils.DrawBorderStringFourWay(sb, FontAssets.ItemStack.Value, num4.ToString(), shopx + (float)(24 * j) + (float)num3, shopy + 75f + (float)FontAssets.ItemStack.Value.LineSpacing * 0.75f, Color.White, Color.Black, new Vector2(0f, (float)FontAssets.ItemStack.Value.LineSpacing), 0.75f * coinDrawState.stackTextScale);
3397 }
3398 }

3432 }

3434 {

3444 }

3469 // Token: 0x060019C7 RID: 6599 RVA: 0x004F1608 File Offset: 0x004EF808
3470 public static Color GetItemLight(ref Color currentColor, ref float scale, int type, bool outInTheWorld = false, float lightScalar = 1f)
3471 {
3472 if (type < 0 || type > (int)ItemID.Count)
3473 {
3474 return currentColor;
3475 }
3476 if (type == 662 || type == 663 || type == 5444 || type == 5450 || type == 5643)
3477 {
3478 currentColor.R = (byte)Main.DiscoR;
3479 currentColor.G = (byte)Main.DiscoG;
3480 currentColor.B = (byte)Main.DiscoB;
3481 currentColor.A = byte.MaxValue;
3482 currentColor *= lightScalar;
3483 }
3484 if (type == 5128)
3485 {
3486 currentColor.R = (byte)Main.DiscoR;
3487 currentColor.G = (byte)Main.DiscoG;
3488 currentColor.B = (byte)Main.DiscoB;
3489 currentColor.A = byte.MaxValue;
3490 currentColor *= lightScalar;
3491 }
3492 else if (ItemID.Sets.ItemIconPulse[type])
3493 {
3494 scale = Main.essScale;
3495 currentColor.R = (byte)((float)currentColor.R * scale);
3496 currentColor.G = (byte)((float)currentColor.G * scale);
3497 currentColor.B = (byte)((float)currentColor.B * scale);
3498 currentColor.A = (byte)((float)currentColor.A * scale);
3499 currentColor *= lightScalar;
3500 }
3501 else if (type == 58 || type == 184 || type == 4143)
3502 {
3503 scale = Main.essScale * 0.25f + 0.75f;
3504 currentColor.R = (byte)((float)currentColor.R * scale);
3505 currentColor.G = (byte)((float)currentColor.G * scale);
3506 currentColor.B = (byte)((float)currentColor.B * scale);
3507 currentColor.A = (byte)((float)currentColor.A * scale);
3508 currentColor *= lightScalar;
3509 }
3510 return currentColor;
3511 }

3668 // Token: 0x060019CD RID: 6605 RVA: 0x004CCF67 File Offset: 0x004CB167
3669 public static bool CanExecuteCommand()

3672 }
3673
3674 // Token: 0x060019CE RID: 6606 RVA: 0x004F1E10 File Offset: 0x004F0010
3675 public static string GetGamepadInstructions(Item[] inv, int context = 0, int slot = 0)
3676 {
3677 Player player = Main.player[Main.myPlayer];
3678 string text = "";
3679 if (inv == null || inv[slot] == null || Main.mouseItem == null)
3680 {
3681 return text;
3682 }
3683 if (context == 0 || context == 1 || context == 2)
3684 {
3685 if (inv[slot].type > 0 && inv[slot].stack > 0)
3686 {
3687 if (Main.mouseItem.type > 0)
3688 {
3689 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[65].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"] });
3690 if (inv[slot].type == Main.mouseItem.type && Main.mouseItem.stack < inv[slot].maxStack && inv[slot].maxStack > 1)
3691 {
3692 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[55].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
3693 }
3694 }
3695 else
3696 {
3697 if (context == 0 && player.chest == -1 && PlayerInput.AllowExecutionOfGamepadInstructions)
3698 {
3699 player.DpadRadial.ChangeBinding(slot);
3700 }
3701 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[54].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"] });
3702 if (inv[slot].maxStack > 1)
3703 {
3704 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[55].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseRight"] });
3705 }
3706 }
3707 if (ItemID.Sets.OpenableBag[inv[slot].type])
3708 {
3709 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Language.GetTextValue("UI.ActionOpen"), new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["Grapple"] });
3710 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.Grapple)
3711 {
3712 ItemSlot.TryOpenContainer(inv, context, slot, player);
3713 PlayerInput.LockGamepadButtons("Grapple");
3714 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.TryRevertingToMouseMode();
3715 }
3716 }
3717 else if (ItemID.Sets.HasItemSwap[inv[slot].type])
3718 {
3719 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Language.GetTextValue("UI.ActionChangeType"), new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["Grapple"] });
3720 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.Grapple)
3721 {
3722 ItemSlot.TryItemSwap(inv[slot]);

4161 {

4166 int cursorOverride = Main.cursorOverride;
4167 Main.mouseLeft = true;
4168 Main.cursorOverride = alternateClickAction.Value.cursorOverride;

4170 Main.cursorOverride = cursorOverride;
4171 Main.mouseLeft = mouseLeft;

4173 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.TryRevertingToMouseMode();

4176 ItemSlot.ShiftForcedOn = false;
4177 }

4183 }
4184
4185 // Token: 0x060019CF RID: 6607 RVA: 0x004F34F7 File Offset: 0x004F16F7
4186 private static bool CanDoSimulatedClickAction()
4187 {
4188 return !PlayerInput.SteamDeckIsUsed || UILinkPointNavigator.InUse;
4189 }
4190
4191 // Token: 0x060019D0 RID: 6608 RVA: 0x004F3508 File Offset: 0x004F1708
4192 private static bool TryEnteringFastUseMode(Item[] inv, int context, int slot, Player player, ref string s)
4193 {
4194 int num = 0;
4195 if (Main.mouseItem.CanBeQuickUsed)
4196 {
4197 num = 1;
4198 }
4199 if (num == 0 && Main.mouseItem.stack <= 0 && context == 0 && inv[slot].CanBeQuickUsed)
4200 {
4201 num = 2;
4202 }
4203 if (num > 0)
4204 {
4205 s += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Language.GetTextValue("UI.QuickUseItem"), new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["QuickMount"] });
4206 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.QuickMount)
4207 {
4208 if (num == 1)
4209 {
4210 PlayerInput.TryEnteringFastUseModeForMouseItem();
4211 }
4212 else if (num == 2)
4213 {
4214 PlayerInput.TryEnteringFastUseModeForInventorySlot(slot);
4215 }
4216 }
4217 return true;
4218 }
4219 return false;
4220 }
4221
4222 // Token: 0x060019D1 RID: 6609 RVA: 0x004F35B0 File Offset: 0x004F17B0
4223 private static bool TryEnteringBuildingMode(Item[] inv, int context, int slot, Player player, ref string s)
4224 {
4225 int num = 0;
4226 if (ItemSlot.IsABuildingItem(Main.mouseItem))
4227 {
4228 num = 1;
4229 }
4230 if (num == 0 && Main.mouseItem.stack <= 0 && context == 0 && ItemSlot.IsABuildingItem(inv[slot]))
4231 {
4232 num = 2;
4233 }
4234 if (num > 0)
4235 {
4236 Item item = Main.mouseItem;
4237 if (num == 1)
4238 {
4239 item = Main.mouseItem;
4240 }
4241 if (num == 2)
4242 {
4243 item = inv[slot];
4244 }
4245 if (num != 1 || player.ItemSpace(item).CanTakeItemToPersonalInventory)
4246 {
4247 if (item.damage > 0 && item.ammo == 0)
4248 {
4249 s += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[60].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["QuickMount"] });
4250 }
4251 else if (item.createTile >= 0 || item.createWall > 0)
4252 {
4253 s += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[61].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["QuickMount"] });
4254 }
4255 else
4256 {
4257 s += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[63].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["QuickMount"] });
4258 }
4259 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.QuickMount)
4260 {
4261 PlayerInput.EnterBuildingMode();
4262 }
4263 return true;
4264 }
4265 }
4266 return false;
4267 }
4268
4269 // Token: 0x060019D2 RID: 6610 RVA: 0x004F371C File Offset: 0x004F191C
4270 public static string GetQuickCraftGamepadInstructions(Recipe recipe)
4271 {
4272 Player localPlayer = Main.LocalPlayer;
4273 if (!Main.mouseItem.IsAir || !localPlayer.ItemSpace(recipe.createItem).CanTakeItemToPersonalInventory || localPlayer.HasLockedInventory())
4274 {
4275 return null;
4276 }
4277 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.Current.Grapple && (Main.stackSplit <= 1 || PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.Grapple))
4278 {
4279 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.Grapple)
4280 {
4281 UILinksInitializer.SomeVarsForUILinkers.SequencedCraftingCurrent = Main.recipe[Main.availableRecipe[Main.focusRecipe]];
4282 }
4283 ItemSlot.RefreshStackSplitCooldown();
4284 Main.quickCraftStackSplit = true;
4285 if (UILinksInitializer.SomeVarsForUILinkers.SequencedCraftingCurrent == Main.recipe[Main.availableRecipe[Main.focusRecipe]])
4286 {
4287 CraftingRequests.CraftItem(recipe, 1, true);
4288 }
4289 }
4290 return PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[71].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["Grapple"] });
4291 }
4292
4293 // Token: 0x060019D3 RID: 6611 RVA: 0x004F3818 File Offset: 0x004F1A18
4294 public static string GetCraftSlotGamepadInstructions()
4295 {
4296 if (Main.InGuideCraftMenu)
4297 {
4298 return "";
4299 }
4300 string text = "";
4301 Player localPlayer = Main.LocalPlayer;
4302 Recipe recipe = Main.recipe[Main.availableRecipe[Main.focusRecipe]];
4303 string quickCraftGamepadInstructions = ItemSlot.GetQuickCraftGamepadInstructions(recipe);
4304 if (quickCraftGamepadInstructions == null && Main.mouseItem.stack == 1 && Main.mouseItem.CanBeEquipped())
4305 {
4306 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[67].Value, new List<string>[] { PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["Grapple"] });
4307 if (ItemSlot.CanExecuteCommand() && PlayerInput.Triggers.JustPressed.Grapple)
4308 {
4309 ItemSlot.SwapEquip(ref Main.mouseItem, 0);
4310 if (Main.player[Main.myPlayer].ItemSpace(Main.mouseItem).CanTakeItemToPersonalInventory)
4311 {
4312 Main.mouseItem = localPlayer.GetItem(Main.mouseItem, GetItemSettings.QuickTransferFromSlot);
4313 }
4314 PlayerInput.LockGamepadButtons("Grapple");
4315 PlayerInput.SettingsForUI.TryRevertingToMouseMode();
4316 }
4317 }
4318 if (Main.mouseItem.IsAir || (Main.mouseItem.CanHavePrefixes() && Item.CanStack(Main.mouseItem, recipe.createItem) && Main.mouseItem.stack + recipe.createItem.stack <= Main.mouseItem.maxStack))
4319 {
4320 text += PlayerInput.BuildCommand(Lang.misc[72].Value, new List<string>[]
4321 {
4322 PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseLeft"],
4323 PlayerInput.ProfileGamepadUI.KeyStatus["MouseRight"]
4324 });
4325 }
4326 if (quickCraftGamepadInstructions != null)
4327 {
4328 text += quickCraftGamepadInstructions;
4329 }
4330 return text;
4331 }
4332
4333 // Token: 0x060019D4 RID: 6612 RVA: 0x004F39C1 File Offset: 0x004F1BC1
4334 public static bool IsABuildingItem(Item item)
4335 {
4336 return item.type > 0 && item.stack > 0 && item.useStyle != 0 && item.useTime > 0;
4337 }
4338
4339 // Token: 0x060019D5 RID: 6613 RVA: 0x004F39E8 File Offset: 0x004F1BE8
4340 public static void SelectEquipPage(Item item)
4341 {
4342 Main.EquipPage = -1;
4343 if (item.IsAir)
4344 {
4345 return;
4346 }
4347 if (Main.projHook[item.shoot])
4348 {
4349 Main.EquipPage = 2;
4350 return;
4351 }
4352 if (item.mountType != -1)
4353 {
4354 Main.EquipPage = 2;
4355 return;
4356 }
4357 if (item.buffType > 0 && Main.vanityPet[item.buffType])
4358 {
4359 Main.EquipPage = 2;
4360 return;
4361 }
4362 if (item.buffType > 0 && Main.lightPet[item.buffType])
4363 {
4364 Main.EquipPage = 2;
4365 return;
4366 }
4367 if (item.dye > 0 && Main.EquipPageSelected == 1)
4368 {
4369 Main.EquipPage = 0;
4370 return;
4371 }
4372 if (item.legSlot != -1 || item.headSlot != -1 || item.bodySlot != -1 || item.accessory)
4373 {
4374 Main.EquipPage = 0;
4375 }
4376 }
4377

4680 // Token: 0x0600401F RID: 16415 RVA: 0x0069D6E4 File Offset: 0x0069B8E4
4681 public static ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction? GetSellOrTrash(Item item)
4682 {
4683 if (Main.npcShop <= 0)
4684 {
4685 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.Trash);
4686 }
4687 if (item.type >= 71 && item.type <= 74)
4688 {
4689 return null;
4690 }
4691 return new ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction?(ItemSlot.AlternateClickAction.Sell);
4692 }
